title: Foundations of 3DGS
learningObjectives: Contrast implicit (NeRF) and explicit (3DGS) neural scene representations across training speed, rendering speed, and editability.
Describe all 59 parameters of a 3D Gaussian splat and explain why the covariance factorization \(\Sigma = RSS^\top R^\top\) is used.
Trace the tile-based rasterization pipeline from 3D Gaussians to a rendered image, including depth sorting and alpha compositing.
Explain the adaptive densification loop: when cloning, splitting, and pruning occur and what gradients drive each decision.
Summarize the motivation and key ideas behind 2DGS, 4DGS, HierarchicalGS, relighting, and GS editing extensions.
Determine whether a given use of the gaussian-splatting codebase requires authorization from Inria, and identify permissively-licensed alternatives for commercial contexts.

readings.title: Gaussian Mathematics: Attributes, Covariance, and Spherical Harmonics
The Gaussian Splatting License: What You Can and Cannot Do
